Package com.rays.service

Interface UserServiceInt

  • All Superinterfaces:
    BaseServiceInt<UserDTO>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    UserServiceImpl
    public interface UserServiceInt
extends BaseServiceInt<UserDTO>
    Service interface for UserDTO. Extends BaseServiceInt with authentication, registration, and password management operations.
    Author:
    Ajay Pratap Kerketta

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      UserDTO authenticate​(java.lang.String loginId, java.lang.String password)
      Authenticates a user by login ID and password.
      UserDTO changePassword​(java.lang.String loginId, java.lang.String oldPassword, java.lang.String newPassword, UserContext userContext)
      Changes a user's password after verifying the old password, then sends a confirmation email.
      UserDTO findByLoginId​(java.lang.String name, UserContext userContext)
      Finds a user by their login ID.
      UserDTO forgotPassword​(java.lang.String loginId)
      Sends the user's existing password to their registered email if the login ID is found.
      UserDTO register​(UserDTO dto, UserContext userContext)
      Registers a new user, persists them, and sends a welcome email with credentials.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.rays.common.BaseServiceInt

        add, delete, findById, findByUniqueKey, save, search, search, update

    • Method Detail

      • findByLoginId

        UserDTO findByLoginId​(java.lang.String name,
                      UserContext userContext)
        Finds a user by their login ID.
        Parameters:
        name - the login ID to search for
        userContext - the current user's context
        Returns:
        the matching UserDTO, or null if not found

      • register

        UserDTO register​(UserDTO dto,
                 UserContext userContext)
        Registers a new user, persists them, and sends a welcome email with credentials.
        Parameters:
        dto - the user DTO to register
        userContext - the current user's context
        Returns:
        the registered UserDTO with the generated ID set

      • authenticate

        UserDTO authenticate​(java.lang.String loginId,
                     java.lang.String password)
        Authenticates a user by login ID and password. Updates lastLogin on success or increments unsuccessfulLoginAttempt on failure.
        Parameters:
        loginId - the user's login ID
        password - the plain-text password to verify
        Returns:
        the authenticated UserDTO on success, or null on failure

      • forgotPassword

        UserDTO forgotPassword​(java.lang.String loginId)
        Sends the user's existing password to their registered email if the login ID is found.
        Parameters:
        loginId - the login ID to look up
        Returns:
        the matching UserDTO, or null if the login ID is not found

      • changePassword

        UserDTO changePassword​(java.lang.String loginId,
                       java.lang.String oldPassword,
                       java.lang.String newPassword,
                       UserContext userContext)
        Changes a user's password after verifying the old password, then sends a confirmation email.
        Parameters:
        loginId - the login ID of the user
        oldPassword - the current password to verify
        newPassword - the new password to set
        userContext - the current user's context
        Returns:
        the updated UserDTO on success, or null if the old password does not match
